scripts.text:
-- Update Sales Tax record with TABC fk where business_key matches
UPDATE mp
SET
    mp.fk_tabc_license_id = t.license_id,
    mp.license_status     = t.license_status,
    mp.source_type        = 'BOTH',
    mp.updated_at         = CONVERT(NVARCHAR, GETDATE(), 120)
FROM dbo.master_permits mp
INNER JOIN dbo.tabc_permits t
    ON mp.business_key = CONCAT(t.trade_name, '-', t.address, '-', t.city)
WHERE mp.source_type = 'SALESTAX';

-- Delete the now-duplicate TABC only record
DELETE FROM dbo.master_permits
WHERE source_type = 'TABC'
AND business_key IN (
    SELECT business_key FROM dbo.master_permits
    WHERE source_type = 'BOTH'
);
